query:
UPDATE campaigns c
INNER JOIN campaign_mood_board_images mb ON mb.campaignId = c.id AND mb.isPrimary = 1
SET c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl = mb.imageUrl
WHERE c.moodBoardPrimaryImageUrl IS NULL;
command:
